logger.doc:name: Logger OS batch
logger.message: Integration: send-service-order-to-salesforce | Before Send OS to salesforce Status | payload model : #[payload[0]]

logger.doc:name: Logger Line Items Service Batch
logger.message: Integration: send-service-order-to-salesforce | Before Send Line Items Service Batch | payload model : #[payload[0]]

ee:transform.doc:name: Map Payload to Line Items - Service
Map Payload to Line Items - Parts

logger.doc:name: Logger Line Items Parts Batch
logger.message: Integration: send-service-order-to-salesforce | Before Send Line Items Parts Batch | payload model : #[payload[0]]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { allOrNone: false, records: payload }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 var consult = payload.compositeResponse.body[0].records[0] output application/json --- { Agendamento_Data: consult.StartDate__c[0 to 18], Agendamento_Observacao: consult.Observation__c, Agendamento_Status: consult.Status__c, Agendamento_EmpresaCod: consult.Store__r, Agendamento_Tipo: consult.Type__c }

%dw 2.0 var prod = payload.compositeResponse.body[1].records output application/json --- prod map (value, index) -> { OficinaServico_DescricaoProblemaSolucao: value.Description , Oficina_DataPrevisao: value.StartDate__c , OficinaServico_TMOCod: value.WorkOrderLineItem__r.PricebookEntry.Product2.ExternalId__c , OficinaServico_Qtde: value.WorkOrderLineItem__r.Quantity , OficinaServico_ValorUnitario: value.WorkOrderLineItem__r.UnitPrice , OficinaServico_PercDesconto: value.WorkOrderLineItem__r.Discount , OficinaServico_ValorDesconto: value.WorkOrderLineItem__r.DiscountValue__c , OficinaServico_Horas: value.WorkOrderLineItem__r.Duration , OficinaServico_AgendamentoCod: value.WorkOrder__r.SchedulingExternalId__c , OficinaServico_SetorExecucao: value.WorkOrderLineItem__r.ExecutionSector__c , OficinaServico_StatusAndamento: value.WorkOrderLineItem__r.Status , OficinaServico_TipoOSCod: value.WorkOrderLineItem__r.WorkOrderType__r.ExternalId__c , OficinaServico_UsuarioCodResponsavel: value.Seller__r.ExternalId__c }
